backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage, booking form submission, and admin retrieval, with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of the DJ Fizz logo asset and the update to Hero.tsx to reference the new PNG, ensuring no light background classes interfere with the dark hero.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key content of every component, page, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the DJ Fizz React app, mounting the app at #root and loading the Vite entry point src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining the root layout with Header/Footer and two routes: HomePage at / and AdminPage at /admin.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying DJ Fizz's portrait photo with neon green glow border and bio copy, without stat counter cards.
frontend/src/components/AddOns.tsx: Premium add-ons section rendering five glass cards for lighting, audio, and projection services with neon green icons and a custom packages note.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Eight-field booking inquiry form that submits event details to the Motoko backend via the useSubmitForm mutation, with loading, success, and error UI states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info, social icons, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Displays a styled grid gallery of six event-type cards (weddings, corporate, school dances, etc.) using emoji, gradient backgrounds, and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, an admin route button, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section featuring animated neon light beams, the DJ Fizz logo, a headline, and call-to-action buttons for booking and services.
frontend/src/components/MoreThanMusic.ts: Section highlighting DJ Fizz's event-professional services (timeline management, crowd reading, planner coordination, transitions) via a two-column layout with icon cards.
frontend/src/components/SEOSection.tsx: SEO-focused section emphasizing DJ Fizz's Raleigh/Triangle service area with keyword-rich copy, three feature badges, and a booking CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a 'Services' section with four service cards (Weddings, Corporate Events, School Dances, Private Parties), each with an icon, description, and a smooth-scroll button to the booking section.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Displays a grid of five client testimonials with star ratings, quotes, and event details in a glassmorphism card layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all booking form submissions (useGetAllSubmissions) and submitting a new booking form (useSubmitForm) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with a dark neon-green theme, and defines custom utility classes for glow effects, glassmorphism cards, beam animations, and fade-in transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that fetches and displays all booking form submissions in styled cards with contact details, event info, and timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the public-facing homepage by rendering all section components in order: Hero, About, Services, AddOns, MoreThanMusic, Gallery, Testimonials, SEOSection, and BookingForm.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark DJ-themed design system with neon green accents, custom OKLCH color tokens, display/sans font families, neon box-shadow utilities, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking the DJ Fizz website build, including architecture notes, known issues, existing features, and requirements for a black/neon-green DJ site with booking form, admin page, and various content sections targeting Raleigh, NC events.
